display_name.title: Display name for the VM
display_name.description: The display name of the VM.

description.title: Description of the VM
description.description: Describe what this VM is used for.
description.default: I will use this VM for research.

os_image.title: Windows image
os_image.description: Select Windows image to use for VM. (OUH image will not work with the H100 GPU VMs at the moment.)

vm_size.title: VM Size
vm_size.description: Select the size of VM for your workload. VMs can only be resized within the same series (e.g. Dsv5 to Dsv5); resizing across series is not supported. GPU quota is shared across all workspaces on the platform — deploying a GPU VM that is not actively in use consumes quota that may be needed by other researchers. Quota is only released when a VM is deleted, not when it is stopped.

oneOf.const: B-Series | 2 CPU | 4GB RAM | Text editing | £0.05/ hour
oneOf.title: B-Series | 2 CPU | 4GB RAM | Text editing | £0.05/ hour
oneOf.description: Very low cost. Suitable for text editing, document review, and light portal use only. Not suitable for data analysis or scripting.

oneOf.title: Dsv5 Series | 2 CPU | 8GB RAM | £0.15/ hour
oneOf.description: Good starting point for general research workloads. Suitable for R and Python scripting, data exploration, and typical analysis tasks.

oneOf.title: Fas Series | 2 CPU | 8GB RAM | £0.20/ hour
oneOf.description: Compute-optimised (AMD EPYC, 4th Gen). Each vCPU is a full physical core with no hyperthreading. Suited to parallelised or CPU-bound workloads.

oneOf.title: Das_v5 Series | 4 CPU | 16GB RAM | £0.30/ hour
oneOf.description: General purpose with AMD processor. Good balance of CPU and memory for mid-sized analysis workloads.

oneOf.title: Fs_v2 Series | 4 CPU | 8GB RAM | £0.30/ hour
oneOf.description: Compute-optimised. Lower memory ratio than D-series; suited to CPU-intensive tasks where memory is not the constraint.

oneOf.title: Dsv5 Series | 4 CPU | 16GB RAM | £0.30/ hour
oneOf.description: General purpose. Good all-round choice for R and Python workloads with moderate memory requirements.

oneOf.title: Fas Series | 4 CPU | 16GB RAM | £0.40/ hour
oneOf.description: Compute-optimised (AMD EPYC, 4th Gen). Each vCPU is a full physical core with no hyperthreading. Suited to parallelised or CPU-bound workloads.

oneOf.title: Fs_v2 Series | 8 CPU | 16GB RAM | £0.60/ hour
oneOf.description: Compute-optimised. Lower memory ratio than D-series; suited to CPU-intensive tasks where memory is not the constraint.

oneOf.title: Dsv5 Series | 8 CPU | 32GB RAM | £0.65/ hour
oneOf.description: General purpose. Suitable for larger datasets and memory-intensive analysis. A good step up when 4 CPU / 16GB is insufficient.

oneOf.title: Fas Series | 8 CPU | 32GB RAM | £0.75/ hour
oneOf.description: Compute-optimised (AMD EPYC, 4th Gen). Each vCPU is a full physical core with no hyperthreading. Suited to parallelised or CPU-bound workloads.

oneOf.title: Easv4 Series | 8 CPU | 64GB RAM | £0.75/ hour
oneOf.description: Memory-optimised. High memory-to-CPU ratio. Suited to in-memory operations, large dataframes, or workloads that require holding substantial data in RAM.

oneOf.title: Fs_v2 Series | 16 CPU | 32GB RAM | £1.15/ hour
oneOf.description: Compute-optimised. Lower memory ratio than D-series; suited to CPU-intensive tasks where memory is not the constraint.

oneOf.title: Dsv5 Series | 16 CPU | 64GB RAM | £1.25/ hour
oneOf.description: General purpose, large. Suitable for parallelised analysis, large model fitting, or workloads requiring both high CPU and substantial memory.

oneOf.title: Easv4 Series | 16 CPU | 128GB RAM | £1.50/ hour
oneOf.description: Memory-optimised, large. High memory-to-CPU ratio. Suited to in-memory operations, large dataframes, or workloads that require holding substantial data in RAM.

oneOf.const: NV6ads_A10_v5 Series | 6 CPU 55GB RAM | 1/6 A10 GPU 4GB RAM | £0.61/ hour
oneOf.title: NV6ads_A10_v5 Series | 6 CPU 55GB RAM | 1/6 A10 GPU 4GB RAM | £0.61/ hour
oneOf.description: Entry-level GPU (NVIDIA A10, 4GB VRAM). Suitable for GPU-accelerated visualisation and light inference. GPU quota is shared across all workspaces and is only released when a VM is deleted — please delete this VM when it is no longer actively in use.

oneOf.const: NV12ads_A10_v5 Series | 12 CPU 110GB RAM | 1/3 A10 GPU 8GB RAM | £1.22/ hour
oneOf.title: NV12ads_A10_v5 Series | 12 CPU 110GB RAM | 1/3 A10 GPU 8GB RAM | £1.22/ hour
oneOf.description: Mid-range GPU partition (NVIDIA A10, 8GB VRAM). Suitable for GPU-accelerated inference and visualisation workloads. GPU quota is shared across all workspaces and is only released when a VM is deleted — please delete this VM when it is no longer actively in use.

oneOf.const: NV18ads_A10_v5 Series | 18 CPU 220GB RAM | 1/2 A10 GPU 12GB RAM | £2.05/ hour
oneOf.title: NV18ads_A10_v5 Series | 18 CPU 220GB RAM | 1/2 A10 GPU 12GB RAM | £2.05/ hour
oneOf.description: Half A10 GPU (NVIDIA A10, 12GB VRAM). Suitable for more demanding inference or visualisation workloads. GPU quota is shared across all workspaces and is only released when a VM is deleted — please delete this VM when it is no longer actively in use.

oneOf.const: NV36ads_A10_v5 Series | 36 CPU 440GB RAM | 1 A10 GPU 24GB RAM | £4.11/ hour
oneOf.title: NV36ads_A10_v5 Series | 36 CPU 440GB RAM | 1 A10 GPU 24GB RAM | £4.11/ hour
oneOf.description: Full A10 GPU (NVIDIA A10, 24GB VRAM). Suitable for GPU-accelerated ML inference and visualisation. GPU quota is shared across all workspaces and is only released when a VM is deleted — please delete this VM when it is no longer actively in use.

oneOf.const: NV72ads_A10_v5 Series | 72 CPU 880GB RAM | 2 A10 GPU 48GB RAM | £8.60/ hour
oneOf.title: NV72ads_A10_v5 Series | 72 CPU 880GB RAM | 2 A10 GPU 48GB RAM | £8.60/ hour
oneOf.description: Dual A10 GPU (2× NVIDIA A10, 48GB VRAM total). For workloads requiring maximum A10 GPU capacity. GPU quota is shared across all workspaces and is only released when a VM is deleted — please delete this VM when it is no longer actively in use.

oneOf.const: NC40ads_H100_v5 Series | 40 CPU 320GB RAM | 1 H100 NVL GPU 94GB RAM | £7.70/ hour
oneOf.title: NC40ads_H100_v5 Series | 40 CPU 320GB RAM | 1 H100 NVL GPU 94GB RAM | £7.70/ hour
oneOf.description: H100 GPU (NVIDIA H100 NVL, 94GB VRAM). For large model training and high-throughput GPU workloads. H100 quota is extremely limited and shared across all workspaces. Quota is only released when a VM is deleted — please delete this VM as soon as your work is complete.

oneOf.const: NC80adis_H100_v5 Series | 80 CPU 640GB RAM | 2 H100 NVL GPU 188GB RAM | £15.90/ hour
oneOf.title: NC80adis_H100_v5 Series | 80 CPU 640GB RAM | 2 H100 NVL GPU 188GB RAM | £15.90/ hour
oneOf.description: Dual H100 GPU (2× NVIDIA H100 NVL, 188GB VRAM total). For the largest model training workloads requiring maximum GPU capacity. H100 quota is extremely limited and shared across all workspaces. Quota is only released when a VM is deleted — please delete this VM as soon as your work is complete.

enable_shutdown_schedule.title: Enable Shutdown Schedule
enable_shutdown_schedule.description: Enable automatic shutdown schedule for the VM

assign_to_another_user.title: Assign this VM to another user
assign_to_another_user.description: Check this box if you want to assign this VM to another user.

shutdown_time.title: Shutdown Time
shutdown_time.description: Time of day to shutdown the VM (HHmm format), e.g. 1800

owner_id.title: Owner ID
owner_id.description: Enter the Object ID of the user you want to assign this VM to.
